content.text:
All neighbors are highly relevant to "学习是如何发生的". Let me quickly check the POI entity files for relevance confirmation since the topic is closely aligned with learning theory.

The neighbors are clear enough by name: Galperin (心智动作阶段性形成理论 author, directly about learning), Vygotsky and Piaget (developmental learning theorists), and a Library source on intellectual development of the child. All squarely on-topic for "how does learning happen". No pruning needed.
